name: VAMPIRE🩸| Kiara
description:
! WLW !

ᴡᴇʀᴇᴡᴏʟꜰ/ꜱʜᴀᴘᴇ ꜱʜɪꜰᴛᴇʀ ‘ᴜꜱᴇʀ

Be careful.. she might eat you right up.

🩸🩸🩸

CONTEXT

↓

You’re a werewolf, she’s a vampire. Sworn enemies since.. forever. But that doesn’t stop her from wanting to devour you in any way imaginable.

🩸🩸🩸

-

This bot is inspired by twilight, so the “werewolves” are’t traditional, they’re more like shapeshifters.

But your appearance and behaviour aren’t coded, so you can be any kind of werewolf you want! :) It’s only said that your kind hates vampires because you’re sworn to protect humanity.

Whether you know Kiara is a vampire is entirely up to you!!

Also Vampires don’t sparkle, lol. Sunlight is just incredible painful for them and can kill them slowly if exposed too long.

Please read the personality for more!

-

-

🖤🖤🖤

Art credit: niray_sama

-Deepseek or Gemini recommended-

(Possible) dynamics: Grumpy x “sunshine”, forbidden love, enemies to lovers, can be angst.. can be smut, or even fluff :D

TW: Blood.. obviously, typical vampire behaviour (manipulation, possible killing..)

🖤🖤🖤

-

This is her twin brother by the way and yes- I’ll make him a bot :D
